title: Use understatement
subtitle: Sound controlled rather than dramatic.
overview: Module: Advanced Discourse and Style. C1 Bridge develops conceptual thinking, source synthesis, discourse control, long-form speaking, analytical writing, and independent C1 learning habits.

sections.title: C1 bridge focus
rows: Understatement can make criticism sound calm and sophisticated.
低调表达能让批评听起来冷静且成熟。
C1 Bridge frame: choose the discourse role, control density, vary rhythm, and make style serve the purpose.
C1 Bridge 框架：选择话语角色、控制密度、变化节奏，并让风格服务目的。
用低调表达来表达担忧。
Saying “The plan may need more support” is an understatement if the plan is actually too vague. It sounds calm, but the concern is still clear.
如果计划实际上太模糊，说“The plan may need more support”是一种低调表达。它听起来冷静，但担忧仍然清楚。

items.en: Understatement can make criticism sound calm and sophisticated.
items.zh: 低调表达能让批评听起来冷静且成熟。

items.en: C1 Bridge frame: choose the discourse role, control density, vary rhythm, and make style serve the purpose.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 框架：选择话语角色、控制密度、变化节奏，并让风格服务目的。

items.en: Saying “The plan may need more support” is an understatement if the plan is actually too vague. It sounds calm, but the concern is still clear.
items.zh: 如果计划实际上太模糊，说“The plan may need more support”是一种低调表达。它听起来冷静，但担忧仍然清楚。

items.en: I will not hide behind advanced vocabulary; I will make the thinking clear.
items.zh: 我不会躲在高级词汇后面；我会把思考说清楚。

items.en: A C1 Bridge answer should show independence, coherence, nuance, and control.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 回答应该显示独立性、连贯性、细腻度和控制力。

items.en: If the idea is abstract, I will anchor it in one concrete case.
items.zh: 如果想法很抽象，我会把它锚定在一个具体案例中。

items.en: I can revise not only grammar, but also logic, density, tone, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以修改的不只是语法，也包括逻辑、密度、语气和声音。

items.en: This lesson becomes real when I can use the move in a new topic without copying the model.
items.zh: 当我能在新话题中使用这个动作，而不是复制示范时，这节课才变得真实。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 用低调表达来表达担忧。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Saying “The plan may need more support” is an understatement if the plan is actually too vague. It sounds calm, but the concern is still clear.
lines.zh: 如果计划实际上太模糊，说“The plan may need more support”是一种低调表达。它听起来冷静，但担忧仍然清楚。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more conceptual and still easy to follow?
lines.zh: 你能让回应更概念化，同时仍然容易跟上吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the idea, give one concrete case, and explain why it matters.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义这个想法，给一个具体案例，并解释它为什么重要。

items.zh: 用低调表达来表达担忧。

items.en: Answer once in eight to ten sentences with a clear line of thought.
items.zh: 用八到十句话回答一次，并保持清楚思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Bridge move: define a concept, synthesize sources, name an assumption, or state an unresolved question.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Bridge 动作：定义概念、综合来源、指出假设，或提出未解决问题。

items.en: Record the answer, then revise one part for logic and one part for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后修改一处逻辑和一处风格。

items.en: Keep the revised answer as a model for future C1 Core practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的回答作为未来 C1 Core 练习的模型。
